summary: Fowler shares a resource for people curious about Smalltalk who want to explore the language. His previously recommended introductory Smalltalk book went out of print, but he discovered it's now available for free download along with other Smalltalk materials. The resources are hosted by Stéphane Ducasse, co-author of a book on reengineering patterns that Fowler recommends.
key_points: Fowler's favorite introductory Smalltalk book is now available as a free download
Stéphane Ducasse hosts a collection of free Smalltalk learning materials
Ducasse co-authored an excellent book on reengineering patterns
money_quotes: From time to time I run into people who want to get a smalltalk and give it a spin to see what the fuss is about.
key_insight: Classic Smalltalk learning resources that were once out of print are now freely available online for those curious about the language.
